examples.title: Algorithm: Collection Interface
examples.description: Demonstrates basic operations of a collection interface
examples.code:
ALGORITHM CollectionInterface
INPUT: elements
OUTPUT: collection

BEGIN
 CREATE collection
 FOR EACH element IN elements
 ADD element TO collection
 END FOR
 RETURN collection
END
examples.explanation: This pseudocode demonstrates the basic operations of a collection interface, including adding elements to a collection.

examples.explanation: This Java code demonstrates the use of the Collection interface, including adding elements to a collection and printing the collection.
